card_description: Anaxagoras is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 4 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies the "horizontal form-axis" (orthogonal time) from his novel *Ubik* as an experientially real cosmological feature, proving Plato's theory of Forms."
